name: Compass lake in the Hills
description: Come play pickleball at Compass lake in the Hills in Alford, FL! There is 1 outdoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is free. The court cannot be reserved.

name: Marianna K-8 School
description: Come play pickleball at Marianna K-8 School in Marianna, FL! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Marianna Pickleball - Chipola College Courts
description: Marianna Pickleball - Chipola College Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Marianna, FL. There are 6 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.
